general_provisions: This bill addresses property tax increases through truth in taxation.
hilighted_provisions: This bill:<hr><ltbullet>defines terms;<hr><ltbullet>requires fiscal year taxing entities proposing a property tax rate increase to make a preliminary statement in a public meeting regarding the taxing entity's consideration of a tax rate increase;<hr><ltbullet>clarifies notice and publication requirements for towns proposing a tax rate increase that do not have public websites;<hr><ltbullet>clarifies the State Tax Commission's authority to deny a taxing entity's proposed tax rate increase for failing to meet truth in taxation requirements;<hr><ltbullet>provides for a one-year period in which the State Tax Commission is not required to deny a fiscal year taxing entity's proposed tax rate increase for failure to comply with certain truth in taxation requirements;<hr><ltbullet>requires fiscal year taxing entities proposing a property tax increase to:<hr><ltbullet1>prepare and adopt an interim budget that includes a property tax impact schedule; and<hr><ltbullet1>reserve a certain amount of the taxing entity's general fund revenue in a restricted budget account for a limited period of time;<hr><ltbullet>includes a coordination clause to incorporate changes made to Section 59-2-919 in S.B. 238, Property Tax Adjustments; and<hr><ltbullet>makes technical and conforming changes.
